description: Looking for some socks to add to your little boys growing collection of clothes? Look no further now that you've discovered our boy's novelty socks which feature various colourful themes. Let your little man choose his own designs with a simple choice of styles. Made from a blend of Cotton, Polyester & Elastane. Benefit from material attributes such as being: super soft, highly durable, moisture-wicking, comfortable and easy to care for. High-quality clothing made from high-quality materials, designed with you and your little one in mind.
